disagreement.question: In computer science, what is the research subfield of Rong Chen, and name one paper, system, institution, or co-author associated with their work? If you don't know who this person is, say so.
disagreement.response_a: Rong Chen is a prominent researcher in computer science, specializing in the subfield of **distributed systems** and **operating systems**, with a particular focus on high-performance computing, memory systems, and virtualization. He is known for his work on projects like the **TH-TS** (Tsinghua-Tencent Hypervisor) and contributions to scalable and efficient system designs. If you're referring to a different Rong Chen, please provide additional context.
